content.en:
Rumble!

Ye Tian was the first to break into this treasure house and directly looked for Hailou Jin.

For him, only Hailou Gold is the most precious resource, and other things are of little value.

In an instant, he locked Hailou Jin.

These sea buildings are being placed in a corner of this treasure house, floating there like stars.

Hailou Gold is aqua blue, each piece of Hailou Gold is about the size of a football, and it exudes a terrible coercion, but for Ye Tian, this coercion is nothing.

Swish!

Ye Tian rushed over and conjured up countless hands to grab these Hailou Jin.

During this period, other Great Ancestors and creatures tried to stop them, but they were directly flown out by Ye Tianzhen.

At this moment, Ye Tian showed his true strength.

But just after Ye Tian took away two-thirds of the Hailou Gold, the three high-level immeasurable lifeforms arrived.

"It's time to go, don't be too greedy!"

Ye Tian directly chose to escape, and these three high-level immeasurable lifeforms tried to intercept Ye Tian and prevent Ye Tian from leaving.

But at this time, those deep-water giant apes began to collect these sea building gold, obviously not wanting these sea building gold to be snatched away.

"Snatch the gold of Hailou, leave him alone!"

These three high-level immeasurable lifeforms no longer stopped Ye Tian, but went to snatch the Hailou Gold.

They knew very well that Ye Tian's strength was not much weaker than them, and if they really stopped Ye Tian, there would be no result, but they would not be able to obtain a piece of sea building gold in this operation.

Of course.

They also passed on Ye Tian's information and asked other Great Ancestors to intercept Ye Tian.

......

"There must be more than that, and there must be a treasure trove where Hailou gold is stored!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he had to keep the sea house gold first.

So, he hid somewhere in the Void Whale Mountain and began to continue to copy the body, although the speed of copying the body with the copy talent mark was slower, but he kept speeding up the time, and soon copied another copy body.

This replica body is a dead Great Ancestor, named the Nine Tours Great Ancestor!

It's just that there are so many fights here, so even if the Nine Tours Ancestor is 'resurrected', the other Ancestors will not feel strange, even if they see the Ninth Patrol Ancestor being killed, they only think that the Ninth Patrol Ancestor has a powerful life-saving method, and he was not really killed before.

Subsequently, Ye Tian put the Hailou Gold on his body on the Nine Patrol Great Ancestor.

In this way, he could let the Ninth Patrol Great Ancestor leave with these sea building gold.

Soon, the Nine Patrol Great Ancestor copied his body and rushed out of the Void Whale Mountain, and even disguised himself as the price of serious injuries and left the main battlefield, so that the danger would be much reduced.

And Ye Tian's other replica body continued to look for other sea building gold in Xumi Whale Mountain.

His purpose was to find more Hailou Gold to prepare for his future promotion to a high-level immeasurable lifeform.

As time slowly passed, the battlefields of the Void Whale Mountain were extremely chaotic, and from time to time, Hailou Jin was discovered, which triggered battles again and again.

And Ye Tian has also snatched some Hailou gold many times, although it is not much, but it is naturally a lot for him personally.

At this time, the Void Whale Mountain changed again.

Click!!

The huge Void Whale Mountain was torn apart by the battle, and a brilliant blue light tore through the endless void and shone into the surrounding territory.

This scene immediately attracted the attention of many Great Ancestors, and even the Hurricane Great Ancestor of the Hurricane Pavilion was attracted to attention.

"That's ......"

Hurricane Ancestor had a guess in his mind.

"It's the !! of Hailou Tianjin"

Hurricane Ancestor couldn't help but cry out.

The other Great Ancestors were also shocked, their hearts full of desire and greed.

They always thought that Xumi Whale Mountain only had Hailou Jin, but they never expected that there would be Hailou Tianjin here.

Hailou Tianjin is also a kind of Hailou Gold, but it is the highest-grade Hailou Gold, which is too helpful for high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it is simply not a resource!

If Hailou Jin makes the heart of a high-level immeasurable lifeform excited, then Hailou Tianjin is enough to make a high-level immeasurable lifeform crazy.

At this moment, many of the Great Ancestors of the Hurricane Pavilion desperately rushed to the location where the Hailou Heavenly Gold was.

......

"Hailou Tianjin!"

Ye Tian saw the brilliant blue light, the condensation of its light far exceeded that of ordinary Hailou Jin, it was indeed only Hailou Tianjin that had such a light.

Ye Tian didn't know much about Hailou Tianjin, but he also knew the preciousness of this kind of treasure.

When I investigated Hailou Jin before, I knew a little about Hailou Tianjin, but Hailou Tianjin was too rare, so there was very little information about Hailou Tianjin, only that it was enough to make high-level immeasurable lifeforms crazy.

Even a big force like the Hurricane Pavilion didn't dare to expect to obtain Hailou Tianjin, if they knew that there was Hailou Tianjin, I was afraid that even more powerful forces would have to break into here at all costs to seize Hailou Tianjin.

Hailou Tianjin is something that even those creatures under the command of the Void Whale Overlord don't know, so they don't know the preciousness of this thing, so they don't come to protect it.

However, the heir of the Void Whale Overlord naturally knew about Hailou Tianjin, so he came directly to protect Hailou Tianjin, and prevented any Great Ancestor from snatching these Hailou Tianjin.

All of a sudden, this little Void Whale was attacked by many Great Ancestors, and he was soon injured.

And the Void Whale Overlord saw that his heir was injured, and the Hailou Tianjin was not guaranteed, so he immediately became anxious.

If he only loses some Hailou gold, it is still within his bearing, but if he loses these Hailou Tianjin, it will be too much loss!

These Hailou Heavenly Gold are his hope to break the shackles, he has been collecting enough Hailou Heavenly Gold, and he has never been willing to refine and use it.

"You have to fight hard!"

The Void Whale Overlord thought to himself.

In an instant, a blue light appeared on the Void Whale Overlord's body, countless stripes spread all over his body, and his aura suddenly increased several times or more.

"Burn the blood!"

Hurricane Ancestor shook them.

At the level of the Void Whale Overlord, the consequences of burning the bloodline are very serious, and it will take a long time to recover, and even some sequelae will be left permanently.

There must be a moment when they won't be so desperate!

And that's not all.

A round diamond appeared in the mouth of the Void Whale Overlord, releasing a brilliant light, which was mixed with some sea tower gold.

What a luxury it is to use Hailou Heavenly Gold to refine weapons!

"Break it for me!"

The Void Whale Overlord used all his might to press this weapon, trying to shoot through the light shield.

Hurricane Ancestor tried to stop them, but they were directly penetrated.

This blow directly pierced through the light mask, and then under the full force of the Void Whale Overlord, it directly cracked.

Seeing this scene, Hurricane Ancestor's expression changed greatly!
